reason: Item 09 is a documentation and coverage closeout for the existing JAX port of src/simsopt/field/force.py. The module-level jit+grad lift at lines 953-976, the _SharedCoilState pre-compute layer at lines 313-820, and the six Optimizable wrappers (B2Energy, NetFluxes, SquaredMeanForce, LpCurveForce, LpCurveTorque, SquaredMeanTorque) are unchanged from the parent commit a9da18fac. No new production hot-path kernel is introduced.

production_scale_floor.nquadpoints_note: All six wrappers in scope are exercised at ncoils>=4 and nquadpoints>=64 by the cited production fixtures and the new closeout test.

dense_materialization_budget.donation_rationale: Upstream non-donating contract preserved. _J_args returns cached coil-state arrays that the wrapper reuses across J() and dJ() until Optimizable invalidates them via recompute_bell.

validation.command: (red-step worktree at a9da18fac) JAX_ENABLE_X64=True JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu PYTHONPATH=src .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m pytest tests/field/test_force_item09_closeout.py -q

(red-step worktree at a9da18fac) SIMSOPT_JAX_TRANSFER_GUARD=disallow JAX_ENABLE_X64=True JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu PYTHONPATH=src .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m pytest tests/field/test_force_item09_closeout.py -q
